analysis.object: T518: Hodge Motivic L-Functions v2 depth analysis

selberg_class.description: Motivic L-functions satisfy Selberg axioms; EML-3 analytic continuation
selberg_class.reason: L-functions are EML-3 oscillatory Dirichlet series

grh_motives.description: GRH for motives = EML-inf; zeros on critical line unproven
grh_motives.reason: GRH is EML-inf statement about EML-3 zeros

ecl_applies.description: ECL machinery applies to Hodge L-functions; shadow depth theorem active
ecl_applies.reason: ECL shadow: EML-inf GRH casts EML-2 shadow via zero-free regions
